# PAYE Solutions (SW) Ltd

> Fully managed payroll bureau based in Bodmin, Cornwall, UK. Over 20 years of experience providing payroll services to businesses of all sizes.

## Company Details
- Company Name: PAYE Solutions (SW) Ltd
- Company Number: 16996037
- VAT Number: 513 408 618
- Address: 79 Higher Bore Street, Bodmin, Cornwall, PL31 1JT
- Phone: 01579 342221
- Email: team@payesolutionsltd.co.uk
- Website: https://payesolutionsltd.co.uk

## Services
- Fully managed payroll processing (weekly, fortnightly, monthly)
- Tax and National Insurance calculations
- Statutory payments (SSP, SMP, SAP, SPP)
- Student loan deductions
- Attachment of earnings orders
- Payslips delivered by email
- P45s, P60s, year-end returns
- HMRC Real Time Information (RTI) submissions
- Pension contribution calculations and auto-enrolment
- Payrolled Benefits in Kind (P11Ds)
- Monthly BACS provision for salary and HMRC payments
- Management and accounting reports
- New starter and leaver processing

## Office Hours
9am to 5pm, Monday to Friday

## Pricing (all net of VAT)
- 1-4 employees: Weekly GBP 20, Fortnightly GBP 25, Four-weekly GBP 30, Monthly GBP 30
- 5-10 employees: Weekly GBP 25, Fortnightly GBP 30, Four-weekly GBP 40, Monthly GBP 40
- 11+ employees: GBP 3 per extra payslip (added to the base rate)
- Setup fee: GBP 75-100 (one-off, depending on complexity)
- Year-end processing and P60s: GBP 2 per employee (minimum charge GBP 35)

- Home: https://payesolutionsltd.co.uk/

- Contact: https://payesolutionsltd.co.uk/contact.html

## Location
Based in mid-Cornwall, serving businesses across Cornwall and the wider South West of England.
